eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Blaine, ID; at 1:31 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 9:31 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Heather Ohio Valley Evacuation area has been put on Level 3 GO STATUS. If you are in Ohio Gulch evacuation immediately.
